{{Infobox group
| name = Subline
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Subline Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Subline is a vast, multi-faceted communication and information network used throughout the galaxy. It functions as a public digital infrastructure where users can access news, read articles, engage in social discourse, and receive alerts regarding mentions on the [[Union]]'s public network. The system is highly diverse, consisting of various specialized channels including corporate, civilian, and regional networks such as the [[Visiria]], [[Free Worlds]], and [[Alliance]] [[Sublines]]. There are even clandestine or dark networks that exist outside of government oversight. Beyond simple messaging, the Subline serves as a powerful medium for public opinion and celebrity culture. Individuals can become famous or notorious on the platform, with news reports influencing how they are perceived by the public. It is also a tool for information gathering, allowing users to compile data or monitor specific routes and organizations. While the network can be subject to government control—as seen during periods of civil war—it remains a central component of galactic [[life]], facilitating everything from individual communications and [[Titan]]-to-[[Titan]] connections to the broadcasting of major news events.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Subline serves as a local planetary broadcast system and communication network used for identity registries, news articles, and various reports. Within the simulation, it functions as a virtual environment filled with cross-chatter between ships, though reception is unavailable once inside the simulation. While it acts as a connection for both the narrator and [[Horizon]], its signals can be blocked by a moon or may be entirely absent in certain sectors. Beyond its role as an information source, the Subline is utilized by guards for communication and can even be used by individuals like [[Sola]] to contact the narrator via a call.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">20</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subline]] provides reports.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Subline]] is a communication channel.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subline]] is a network used for news articles and identity registry.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Captain]] will look for news on the [[Subline]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9">''The Captain'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subline]] is a virtual environment or connection.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subline]] is a communicator used in the simulation.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11">''The Captain'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subline]] is filled with cross-chatter between ships in the simulation.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subline]] is a location or communication channel where ships respond.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subline]] reception is unavailable inside a simulation.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subline]] is a news source.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Subline]] is a type of scam [[Mell]] suspects.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c15">''The Captain'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator and [[Horizon]] are connected through the [[Subline]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Subline]] is a communication method used by guards.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c20">''The Captain'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola]] uses a [[Subline]] call to contact the narrator.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Subline]] communications can be blocked by a moon.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subline]] is a local planetary broadcast system.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subline]] is a source of information or reading.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subline]] is a local communication network.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c32">''The Captain'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|There is no [[Subline]] in the current sector.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39">''The Captain'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Subline]] is a type of feed or connection used for broadcasts.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44">''The Captain'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Subline serves as a multi-faceted network used for communication, recognition, and searching for names or information. This searchable database functions as a platform for digital games, immersive experiences, and holographic articles, though it can also be used to eavesdrop on calls or expose secrets. As a level of access and a type of connection used in [[Subspace]], it allows [[Advocates]] to be seen and connects to [[Union]] relays. During a conflict involving [[Lichborn ships]], the local Subline encoded transmissions, and [[Starhammer]] later utilized these communications to contact the fleet. Within this network, which is accessible via console in local colonies, it is said that the galaxy possesses four corners.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">18</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Subline]] is a network used for recognition and communication.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c1">''The Engineer'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Subline]] is a level of access.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Subline]] is a place where [[Advocates]] are seen.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c6">''The Engineer'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The local [[Subline]] encoded transmissions when [[Lichborn ships]] formed a defensive screen.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Union]] possesses a [[Subline]] that the Advocates' relays connect to.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator's costume makes them look like a [[Subline]] villain.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Subline]] refers to a type of film.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Subline]] is a searchable network or database.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c20">''The Engineer'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Subline]] is a source of digital games and immersive experiences.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22">''The Engineer'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Subline]] can be used to eavesdrop on calls.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The local colony has a [[Subline]] that can be accessed via console.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28">''The Engineer'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] uses [[Subline]] communications to contact the fleet.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Subline]] is a location where it is said the galaxy has 'four corners'.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Subline]] is a type of connection used in [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Jak Escalon]] would betray someone for better [[Subline]] reception.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43">''The Engineer'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Subline]] is a platform used to search for names and information.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Subline]] is a place where secrets can be exposed.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The overseer in [[Ironville]] reads holographic [[Subline]] articles.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55">''The Engineer'', chapter 55</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Subline serves as a vast network that provides a feed for watching events occurring across the galaxy and acts as a general platform where footage can be posted. While it functions as a communication system for the [[Titan Knights]] and allows crew members to connect with one another, the location itself is described as having nothing good. This platform can allow conspiracy theories to proliferate and represents a group that cares about the reputation of the [[Titan Force]]. Although isolated planets can lose contact with their nearest Subline, the network is currently catching up to the [[Visiria]] System.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Subline]] provides a feed for watching events across the galaxy.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1">''The Knight'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Subline]] is a connection used for communication between crew members.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c3">''The Knight'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Subline]] is a location described as having nothing good.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Isolated planets can lose contact with the closest [[Subline]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Subline]] is a communication system used by the [[Titan Knights]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Subline]] is a general network where footage can be posted.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Subline]] is a group that would care about the reputation of the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c31">''The Knight'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Subline]] is a platform where conspiracy theories can proliferate.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Subline]] is catching up to the [[Visiria]] System.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Subline serves as a collection of publicly available reports and profiles that includes various criminal records. This platform functions as a communication method for the [[Zenith Processor]] and provides specific instructions for synthesizing gemstones. While [[Omal]] utilized the resource to research different treatments, the Subline also acts as a space where executions are broadcast live. The platform hosts discussions regarding [[Sola]] and features the sad stories of various volunteers.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Sublines]] are publicly available reports or profiles.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Subline]] provides instructions for synthesizing gemstones.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omal]] used the [[Subline]] to research treatments.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c13">''The Pilot'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Subline]] is a communication method used by the [[Zenith Processor]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Subline]] is a place where executions can occur live.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The volunteers are described as sad stories on the [[Subline]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Subline]] is a platform where things are being said about [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Subline]] contains criminal records.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|On the Subline, it’s often said that the galaxy has “four corners.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Get out here before I blast your secret all over the Subline!<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“You have time to talk, Captain?” Omega asked over our Subline connection.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"There’s nothing good on the Subline around here."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Excellent aim,” the Zenith Processor said over their Subline call.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
